infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: TAMTAM needs access to your camera.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: TAMTAM needs access to your photos.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: TAMTAM needs access to your voice.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: TAMTAM needs access to FaceID to secure your finances.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: TAMTAM needs location access to show you on the map and find shared places.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: TAMTAM needs background location to alert you when you are near shared memories and wishlist spots.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: TAMTAM needs background location to alert you when you are near shared memories.
